objectives.description: Apply .claude/ improvements to .opencode/scripts/update-task-status.sh (revise support, terminal status regeneration, plan-status update for plan operations)
Verify the updated update-task-status.sh handles all status transitions
Apply .claude/ improvements to .opencode/scripts/update-plan-status.sh (PLANNED status normalization, better error messages)
Verify both scripts are executable (chmod +x) and pass syntax check
